login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.
login.devHint: Local-only shortcut. Hidden in production builds.
login.devToastDesc: Dashboard is using mock data — no controller required.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We'll email you a link to choose a new one.
forgot.sentMessage: If an account exists for that address, a password-reset link has been sent. Check your inbox — and spam folder — for a message from PrexorCloud.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose something at least 8 characters long.
reset.completedMessage: Your password has been updated. Sign in with your new password to continue.
reset.missingTokenMessage: This reset link is missing the required token. Request a fresh password-reset email.
reset.successToast: Password updated. Sign in with your new password.
reset.missingToken: The reset link is missing or malformed. Request a new one from the sign-in page.
reset.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a fresh one from the sign-in page.
reset.genericError: Reset failed. Try again, or request a fresh link.
reset.networkError: Can't reach the controller. Check your connection and try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize how the dashboard looks and feels.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the dashboard.

nodes.bulkDrainFailedDesc: Some nodes couldn't be drained. Check the controller logs.
nodes.bulkCordonFailedDesc: Some nodes couldn't be cordoned. Check the controller logs.
nodes.drainFailedDesc: Couldn't drain the node. Check the controller logs.
nodes.cordonFailedDesc: Couldn't cordon the node. Check the controller logs.

groups.startFailedDesc: Check that the group exists and at least one node has capacity.

instances.stopFailedDesc: Couldn't stop {id}. Try again, or force-stop from the detail page.
instances.deleteFailedDesc: Couldn't delete {id}. The instance must be STOPPED, CRASHED, or SCHEDULED first.

templates.createFailedDesc: Check the template name and try again.
templates.updateFailedDesc: Couldn't update the template. Try again, or check the controller logs.
templates.uploadFailedDesc: Check the file and try again.
templates.importFailedDesc: Check the archive and try again.
templates.historyLoadFailedDesc: Try again, or check the controller logs.
templates.restoreFailedDesc: Couldn't roll back to that version. Try again, or check the controller logs.

networks.lobbyInFallback: Cannot include lobby group in fallback chain

catalog.addVersionFailedDesc: Check the platform name and version details.

common.controllerUnreachable: The controller may be unreachable. Try again, or check the controller logs.

backups.createFailedDesc: Couldn't create the backup. Check disk space on the controller host, or check the controller logs.
backups.verifyFailedDesc: Couldn't start verification. Check the controller logs.
backups.deleteFailedDesc: Couldn't delete the backup. Try again, or check the controller logs.
backups.pruneFailedDesc: Couldn't prune backups. Check the controller logs.
backups.restoreStartedDesc: The cluster will pause scheduling and roll back state. This may take several minutes.
backups.restoreFailedDesc: Couldn't start the restore. Check the controller logs.

cluster.ejectFailed: Couldn't eject the controller. Check the controller logs.
cluster.leavingDesc: It will shut down once the membership change commits.
cluster.leaveFailed: Couldn't leave the cluster. Check the controller logs.
cluster.tokenIssuedDesc: Copy the token now — it won't be shown again.
cluster.tokenIssueFailed: Couldn't issue a join token. Check the controller logs.
cluster.tokenRevokeFailed: Couldn't revoke the token. Check the controller logs.

maintenance.updateFailedDesc: Couldn't apply the maintenance change. Try again, or check the controller logs.

credentials.revokeFailedDesc: Couldn't revoke the credential. Try again, or check the controller logs.
credentials.revokeAllFailedDesc: Couldn't revoke the instance's credentials. Try again, or check the controller logs.

adminTokens.generatedDesc: Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
adminTokens.generateFailedDesc: Couldn't generate the join token. Check the controller logs.
adminTokens.revokeFailedDesc: Couldn't revoke the token. Try again, or check the controller logs.

players.journeyLoadFailedDesc: Try again, or check the controller logs.
players.transferFailedDesc: Couldn't transfer the player. Check that the target instance is RUNNING and has capacity.

certificates.revokedDesc: The daemon will lose controller access on next reconnect.
certificates.revokeFailedDesc: Couldn't revoke the certificate. Try again, or check the controller logs.
certificates.unrevokeFailedDesc: Couldn't unrevoke the certificate. Try again, or check the controller logs.

roles.createFailedDesc: Couldn't create the role. Names must match [A-Z][A-Z0-9_]* and be unique.
roles.updateFailedDesc: Couldn't update the role. Built-in roles can't be edited.
roles.deleteFailedDesc: Couldn't delete the role. Built-in roles can't be deleted, and roles in use must be reassigned first.

users.createFailedDesc: Couldn't create the user. Check that the username isn't taken and the password is valid.
users.updateFailedDesc: Couldn't update the user. Try again, or check the controller logs.
users.deleteFailedDesc: Couldn't delete the user. They may be the only admin — promote another user first.

crashes.shareDisabled: Sharing is disabled on this controller.

share.disabled: Sharing is disabled on this controller.
share.notRevocable: Share has no delete token and can't be revoked.

templateMeta.newVariablesFound: Found {count} new variable | Found {count} new variables

errorHandler.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again.
errorHandler.networkMessage: Can't reach the controller. Check your connection or try again in a moment.
errorHandler.retrySuffix: next: try again, or check the controller logs.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Cluster health at a glance — nodes, instances, players, and groups.

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.emptyAddHint: Add a node to get started

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Server groups and their scaling policies.

instances.title: Instances
instances.description: Running Minecraft server processes across the cluster.

startDialog.title: Start Instance
startDialog.description: Schedule a new instance on a server group.

toast.startFailedDesc: Couldn't schedule an instance. Check that the group exists and at least one node has capacity.
toast.bulkStopFailedDesc: Some instances couldn't be stopped. Check the controller logs.
toast.bulkForceStopFailedDesc: Try again, or check the daemon logs on the affected nodes.
toast.bulkDeleteFailedDesc: Each instance must be STOPPED, CRASHED, or SCHEDULED. Check the controller logs.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Versioned filesystem and JVM args used to start instances.
templates.emptyCreateHint: Create your first template to get started
templates.confirmDeleteDescription: Permanently delete '{name}'? All files and version history will be lost.

shares.title: Recent Shares
shares.description: Audit and revoke paste shares created from this controller.
shares.revokeConfirm: Revoke {kind} share {id}? This calls pste DELETE and cannot be undone.
shares.emptyHint: Use the Share buttons on a crash, the diagnostics page, or a console viewer to create one.

crashes.title: Crashes
crashes.description: Non-graceful instance exits — OOM, SIGKILL, ERROR.
crashes.trendTooltip: {count} crash in the last 24h | {count} crashes in the last 24h
crashes.emptyFilterHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.
crashes.emptyHint: Nothing has crashed in the visible window. Healthy is good.

detail.signatureTooltip: Crashes with the same signature share this root cause

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: A record of who did what across the cluster.
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search by user, action, or resource…
audit.emptySearchHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.
audit.emptyHint: No audit entries recorded yet — actions will appear here as they happen.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Every action, deployment, and state change across the cluster.
activity.searchPlaceholder: Search by event type, actor, or message…
activity.emptySearchHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.
activity.emptyHint: Cluster events will appear here as they happen.

logs.title: Logs
logs.description: Live tail of controller and node stdout/stderr.
logs.scrollbackNote: 10 000-line scrollback. History before the session start isn't available.

system.title: System status
system.description: Cluster health, controller version, and runtime configuration.
system.noTraceYet: Perform an action to capture a trace.

users.title: Users
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by username, email, or role…
users.emptySearchHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.
users.emptyHint: Create the first user to grant dashboard access.

tokens.title: Tokens
tokens.description: Single-use join tokens for new daemons.
tokens.searchPlaceholder: Search by token id or node…
tokens.emptyHint: Generate a token to bring a new daemon online.

dialog.title: Generate join token
dialog.oneTimeBody: The token will be shown once. Copy it before closing this dialog.
dialog.pinHint: Leaving this empty issues an unpinned token any pending daemon can claim.

issued.title: Copy this token now
issued.body: It won't be shown again. Once you close this dialog, only revocation is possible.
issued.passwordBody: Anyone with the token can register as the named node and gain workload-credential access.

credentials.title: Workload credentials
credentials.description: Bearer tokens issued to running plugins and proxies. Revoke any that leak.
credentials.searchPlaceholder: Search by instance, group, or node…
credentials.emptyHint: Workload credentials are minted automatically when instances start. New ones appear here as the controller issues them.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Block player joins cluster-wide or per group.
maintenance.globalEnabledBody: All new player joins are rejected. Existing connections are kept.
maintenance.globalEnabledNext: Disable the global toggle below to resume normal scheduling.
maintenance.clusterMaintenanceHint: Rejects new player joins across every group.
maintenance.messagePlaceholder: Cluster will be down for migration from 03:00–04:00 UTC.
maintenance.messageHint: MiniMessage formatting supported. Shown on connect attempts during maintenance.
maintenance.bypassHint: These usernames can connect even when maintenance is on. Use for the runbook operator.
maintenance.noOverrides: No per-group overrides. The cluster-wide toggle above applies to everything.
maintenance.overrideHint: Overrides apply on top of the cluster-wide flag.
maintenance.overrideMessagePlaceholder: Reason shown to players hitting this group.
maintenance.footerBody: Toggling maintenance only affects new join attempts. To force-disconnect, drain the affected nodes or stop the instances directly.

backups.title: Backups
backups.description: Cluster-state snapshots: groups, templates, deployment history.
backups.emptyHint: Run Create backup to take the first snapshot.
backups.pruneCalloutBody: Only the most recent N snapshots are kept. Verified ones are not exempt.
backups.restoreCalloutBody: Scheduler pauses while the controller rolls back groups, templates, and deployment history to the snapshot. Running instances stay up until they're rescheduled against the restored state.
backups.restoreCalloutNext: Take a fresh backup first if you might want to come back. Restores can't be undone.

controllers.title: Cluster controllers
controllers.description: The Raft control plane that runs PrexorCloud. Members, join tokens, and leader-elected work.
controllers.confirmEject: Force-eject controller {nodeId}? It will be removed from the Raft group.
controllers.emptyMembersBody: The controller hasn't stamped any cluster members yet — bootstrap may still be running.
controllers.emptyTokensBody: Issue a token to add another controller to the cluster.

dialog.title: Issue cluster join token
dialog.oneTimeBody: The token will be shown once. Copy it before closing this dialog.
dialog.labelHint: Human-readable name pinned to the AddMember entry for audit.
dialog.addrsHint: One existing controller gRPC host:port per line. The joiner dials these to redeem the token.

issued.title: Copy this token now
issued.body: It won't be shown again. Once you close this dialog, only revocation is possible.
issued.runPrefix: Paste it into the controller wizard's
issued.passwordBody: Anyone with this token can add a controller to the cluster.

leaveDialog.title: Leave cluster?
leaveDialog.body: The cluster will continue with the remaining members. To re-add this controller, generate a new join token and run the installer.

seedDialog.title: Rotate cluster seed?
seedDialog.calloutTitle: Outstanding join tokens will be invalidated.
seedDialog.body: The seed is the HMAC key for every join token. Rotating it means any token issued before this point can no longer be redeemed.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.description: Compromise-response: revoke a node's TLS certificate to force-disconnect it.
certificates.warningTitle: Revoking blocks the daemon's controller access immediately on next reconnect.
certificates.warningBody: Use this when a node is suspected leaked or compromised. Existing instances on the node keep running until the controller marks them UNREACHABLE.
certificates.warningNext: Drain the node first if you want graceful migration.
certificates.searchPlaceholder: Search by node, serial, or reason…
certificates.emptyHint: Every node certificate is currently valid. Use the Revoke button if you need to lock one out.

dialog.title: Revoke certificate?
dialog.calloutBody: On next reconnect, the daemon's TLS handshake is rejected. Existing controller access via active sessions remains until they expire.
dialog.reasonPlaceholder: Suspected compromise; rotating cert before re-bootstrap.

networks.title: Networks
networks.description: Velocity proxies fronting one or more groups, with lobby and fallback routing.
networks.emptyHint: Create a network to centralize lobby + fallback routing for your proxies
networks.confirmDeleteDesc: Permanently delete network '{name}'? Proxies will fall back to default-group routing.

roles.title: Roles
roles.emptyHint: Create a role to bundle permissions for users.
roles.builtInNote: Built-in roles can't be edited or deleted.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.description: Cluster-wide rollout history. Click a row for the per-group view.
deployments.emptyHint: Trigger a deploy from a group to see history here.

map.title: Map
map.description: Cluster topology — every node and the instances running on it.
map.emptyHint: Start a daemon with a join token to see the cluster.
map.emptyMatchesHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.description: Server platforms and the versions available to instances.
catalog.emptyHint: Add a platform to get started

players.title: Players
players.searchPlaceholder: Search by username, UUID, instance, or group…
players.emptyHint: New connections will appear here as players join.
players.emptyMatchesHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.
players.truncated: Showing {shown} of {total} online — list capped. Refine with search to find a specific player.
players.transferHint: Only RUNNING instances are listed. The player keeps their session.

toast.linkFailedDesc: Couldn't link your Minecraft account. Check the username and try again.
toast.unlinkFailedDesc: Couldn't unlink your Minecraft account. Try again, or check the controller logs.
toast.passwordFailedDesc: Check that your current password is correct and the new one is at least 8 characters.

mc.title: Minecraft Account
mc.subtitle: Link your Minecraft account for in-game permissions
mc.usernameHint: We'll verify this against the Mojang API to get your UUID.

signOut.title: Sign Out
signOut.subtitle: End your current session and return to the login page.

registry.title: Module Registry
registry.description: Browse and install signed modules from the configured registries.
registry.noRegistriesTail: to a signed registry index URL, then refresh.

catalogPlatform.confirmDeleteDesc: Remove version '{version}' from {platform}. This action cannot be undone.

toast.notFoundDesc: '{platform}' isn't registered in the catalog. Check the URL or add it from the catalog page.
toast.loadFailedDesc: The controller may be unreachable. Try again, or check the controller logs.
toast.actionFailedDesc: Try again, or check the controller logs.

groupDetail.dangerBody: Permanently delete this group and stop all running instances. This action cannot be undone.
groupDetail.confirmDeleteDesc: Delete group "{name}". All running instances will be stopped and the group configuration will be permanently removed.

toast.loadFailedDesc: Group "{name}" couldn't be reached. It may have been deleted, or the controller is unreachable.
toast.startFailedDesc: Couldn't schedule instances for "{name}". Check that at least one node has capacity.
toast.deleteFailedDesc: Couldn't delete "{name}". Stop running instances first, or check the controller logs.

stageDelete.title: Stage Deletion
stageDelete.desc: Mark '{path}' for deletion? This will be applied when you save.

discardAll.title: Discard All Changes
discardAll.desc: Discard all {count} staged change? This cannot be undone. | Discard all {count} staged changes? This cannot be undone.

deleteTemplate.title: Delete Template
deleteTemplate.desc: Permanently delete '{name}'? All files and version history will be lost.

unsaved.title: Unsaved Changes
unsaved.desc: You have unsaved staged changes that will be lost. Do you want to continue?

toast.loadFailedDesc: Template "{name}" couldn't be reached. It may have been deleted, or the controller is unreachable.
toast.genericRetry: Try again, or check the controller logs.
toast.restoreFailedDesc: Couldn't roll back to that version. Try again, or check the controller logs.

instanceDetail.noMetricsHintServer: Metrics appear once the server is running
instanceDetail.noMetricsHintProxy: Metrics appear once the proxy is running
instanceDetail.confirmDeleteDesc: Remove instance '{id}' from the cluster registry. This action cannot be undone.

toast.loadFailedDesc: Instance {id} couldn't be reached. It may have been deleted, or the controller is unreachable.
toast.stopFailedDesc: Couldn't stop {id}. Try force-stop, or check the controller logs.
toast.forceStopFailedDesc: Couldn't kill {id}. Check the daemon on {node}.
toast.deleteFailedDesc: Couldn't delete {id}. The instance must be STOPPED, CRASHED, or SCHEDULED first.

nodeDetail.notFoundHint: It may have been removed from the cluster, or the join token expired.

drainZone.title: Drain node
drainZone.body: Gracefully stop all running instances and prevent new ones from being scheduled. Existing instances will be migrated to other nodes.

undrainZone.title: Cancel drain
undrainZone.body: Stop the drain process and allow new instances to be scheduled on this node again.

cordonZone.title: Cordon node
cordonZone.body: Prevent new instances from being scheduled on this node. Existing instances will continue running.

uncordonZone.title: Uncordon node
uncordonZone.body: Allow new instances to be scheduled on this node again.

deleteZone.revokeBody: Revoke this join token. The daemon will no longer be able to connect using it.
deleteZone.deleteBody: Remove this node from the cluster registry. This action cannot be undone.

confirm.revokeDesc: Revoke the join token for "{id}". The daemon will no longer be able to connect using it.
confirm.deleteDesc: Delete node "{id}" from the cluster registry. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.drainDesc: Running instances on "{id}" will be gracefully stopped and migrated to other nodes.
confirm.cordonDesc: No new instances will be scheduled on "{id}". Existing instances continue running.

toast.loadFailedDesc: Node {id} couldn't be reached. It may have been deleted, or the controller is unreachable.
toast.genericRetry: Try again, or check the controller logs.
toast.tokenRevokedDesc: Join token for "{id}" has been revoked
toast.cordonedDesc: No new instances will be scheduled on "{id}"

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Runtime-loaded plugins extending the controller and dashboard.
modules.emptyHint: Upload a platform module JAR to extend the controller.
modules.emptyMatchesHint: Try clearing the filter or searching by another term.
modules.confirmRemoveDesc: Remove '{id}' from the controller. The platform module JAR will be deleted.

toast.installFailedDesc: Couldn't install the module. Check the JAR is signed and the controller logs for details.
toast.removeFailedDesc: Couldn't remove the module. Try again, or check the controller logs.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: Crashes, deployments and node events will appear here.

commandPalette.placeholder: Search resources, jump to a page, switch theme…
